Sphinx.description: Random Avatar: Sphinx! The sphinx is Sierra's primary fursona. They have elements of maned wolf in them, such as the colors, pointed ears, and thicker tail.

Aota.description: Random Avatar: Aota. Short for "All of the Above", Aota is a non-canon design that combined the original three avatars; Sphinx, Tiger, and dragon.

Dragon Small.description: Random Avatar: Dragon! Sierra can be peer pressured into a dragon by those around her. The size and duration until it wears off is dependant on how much pressure she received.

Kat Male.description: Random Avatar: Kat! Gender Fluid Tiger/Lion/Dragon hybrid. Kat is, at his core, a collection of nanites and 7 floating processors. He creates himself a physical body that he can use to a relatively normal life.

Kat Female.description: Random Avatar: Kat! Gender Fluid Tiger/Lion/Dragon hybrid. Kat is, at her core, a collection of nanites and 7 floating processors. She creates herself a physical body that she can use to live a relatively normal life.

Kat Nanite.description: Random Avatar: Kat! Gender Fluid Tiger/Lion/Dragon hybrid. This is their true nanite form. This body acts much like a liquid would and can be shifted into different shapes with focus.

Dragon Overload.description: Random Avatar: Dragon! Sierra can be peer pressured into a dragon by those around her. The size and duration until it wears off is dependant on how much pressure she received.

Royal Fox.description: Random Avatar: Sao Devereaux. An unfinished avatar of the ten tailed fox.

Big Fox!.description: Random Avatar: Big Fox! Voted on by stream chat, it started as a joke, but has since become a regular addition to the stream.

Tiger.description: Random Avatar: Tiger! The original pngtuber. From the comic 365 Days to normal, they're stuck as a demonic tiger for a full year. For theme, for a full year, tiger was the only avatar on the stream.

Enfield.song: Song:FractalDiane - Blink And You'll Miss It

Manticore.description: Random Avatar: Candycorn Manticore.... I like manticores. Designed by Brisk/markov-chains

Spooky Avatar.description: Random Avatar: Spooky Mode! What's the scariest thing for an audience of furries and transformation enthusiests? Drawn for October 2023.

Gremlin Sphinx.description: Random Avatar: Gremlin! Based on the GremGang style avatars. Chomp.

Pumpkin Avatar.description: Random Avatar: Pumpkin. Drawn by @AttacRacc, the pumpkin avatar was one of the most popular. It was retired when I made the decisions to have all my avatars be my own art.

Dune Avatar.description: Random Avatar: Dunes of Snow. A quick model of my dnd character. She's a ranger that fights with fists and axes.

Gremlin Dragon.description: Random Avatar: Gremlin! Based on the GremGang style avatars. Chomp.

Dragon Critter.description: Random Avatar: Critter Dragon! A critter of Birchwood Forest, drawn by https://www.twitch.tv/gnarlybuck !

Wickerbeast.description: Random Avatar: Wickerbeast! Community voted pngtuber, who's a punk sparklefur wickerbeast.

Naga.description: Random Avatar: Naga. Early wip of a future naga avatar.

Wolf Noises.description: Random Avatar: [Wolf Noises]. Early wip of a future Goddess of Permission avatar.

Void Skunk.description: Random Avatar: Void Skunk. I have no canon excuse for this. I just like void skunk.

Sparkle Skunk.description: Random Avatar: Sparklefur Skunk. D1d 3NYB0DY H3AR 5Y7HW4V3?

Skunk(?) Avatar.description: Random Avatar: SparkleSkunk but without their lineart.

MTP.description: Random Avatar: MTP. Fox of indulgence, he has to spend money to use his powers.

Dragon Plushie.description: Random Avatar: Dragon Plushie. Made by @Runary

Fluff.description: Random Avatar: Fluff. A gifted avatar from Crazy_Jellybeans, drawn by Ookami_kemono!

Chatterbox.description: Random Avatar: Chatterbox. Have a chat with the fox. She loves to let people indulge in their desires. She might not be the best at predicting how it'll manifest, but whatever it is, it'll probably be fun! And it might not even have future consequences! (Or past consequences.)

Cosmic Entity.description: Random Avatar: Cosmic Entity. A creature made of galaxy, hbeld together by a black hole under the mask.
